ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium the club plays in */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the leagues table */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., D, M, F, GK) */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is currently with */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "joined_club_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the club */,
  "left_club_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the club */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, transferred) */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the player */,
  "player_agent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the player_agents table */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  "player_status_reason" TEXT /* Additional information about the player's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_player_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_agent_id") REFERENCES player_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "base_salary" INTEGER /* Base salary of the player */,
  "guaranteed_compensation" INTEGER /* Guaranteed compensation of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "signing_bonus" INTEGER /* Signing bonus amount */,
  "performance_bonus" INTEGER /* Performance bonus amount */,
  "contract_version" INTEGER /* Version of the contract */,
  "contract_signed_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_negotiated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "contract_approved_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contract_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("contract_approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contract_negotiated_by FOREIGN KEY ("contract_negotiated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., D, M, F, GK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position (e.g., D for Defender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the statistics are from */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Total number of appearances by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player (if a goalkeeper) */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "pass_completion_rate" REAL /* Pass completion rate of the player */,
  "stat_category" TEXT /* Category of the statistics (e.g., offense, defense, goalkeeping) */,
  "stat_subcategory" TEXT /* Sub-category of the statistics (e.g., goals scored, assists, clean sheets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the record is for */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the medical record was created */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who created the record */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the player */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment prescribed for the player */,
  "recovery_period" INTEGER /* Recovery period in days */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the medical record */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  "recovery_progress" REAL /* Recovery progress (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., staff, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, laptop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the system was accessed (e.g., stadium, training facility, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled event */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the event is for */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., match, training session) */,
  "opponent_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent club (if applicable) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "event_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the event */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_opponent_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheduled event the result is for */,
  "home_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home club */,
  "away_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away club */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home club */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away club */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_home_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_away_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES team_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheduled event the session is for */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer who conducted the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., fitness, skill, tactics) */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the session */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players who attended the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  "session_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the session */,
  "session_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES team_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the player agent */,
  "agent_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the player agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)
